title: Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple
tagline: Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Semponnarkoil in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Semponnarkoil in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. This place is also called as Tiruchemponpalli. The historical name of the place is Lakshmipuri and Indirapuri. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Sembanarkoil
topPlaces.description: Sembanarkoil (formerly Semponnarkoil) is a panchayat town in Tharangambadi taluk in Mayiladuthurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is located in the historic Thanjavur area on the banks of the river Kaveri.

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Thirupariyalur
topPlaces.description: Veerateswarar Temple (also called Dakshapureeswarat temple) is a Hindu temple located at Keelaparasalur (formerly known as Thirupariyalur) in the Sembanarkoil block of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirupparialur.

topPlaces.name: Keezhaiyur
topPlaces.description: Keezhaiyur is a revenue village in the Karaikal taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated at a distance of about 6 kilometres south-east of Karaikal town and 2 kilometres east of Tirumalarajanpattinam commune.

topPlaces.name: Ponsei Natrunaiyappar Temple
topPlaces.description: Natrunaiyappar Temple(நற்றுணையப்பர் ஆலயம்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the village of Ponsei or Thirunanipalli (Chola Nadu - South of Kaveri), Mayiladuthurai district, East-Central Tamil Nadu, South India. It's one of the holy place "Tevaram has been sung on the primary god of the Shiva (Paadal Petra sthalam)".

topPlaces.name: Ponsei-Kidarankondan
topPlaces.description: Ponsei Thirunanipalli is one of the villages of Kidarankondan panchayat. It is located in Mayiladuthurai district and state of Tamil Nadu, under Poompuhar Assembly Constituency and Mayiladuthurai parliamentary Constituency.

topPlaces.name: Thanthondreeswarar Temple, Akkur
topPlaces.description: Akkur Thanthondreeswarar Temple(ஆக்கூர் தான்தோன்றீசுவரர் கோயில் ]) is a Hindu temple located at Akkur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Akkur, Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Akkur is a small town in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from Mayiladuthurai town. Akkur is located 260 km from the state capital, Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Manjalar River
topPlaces.description: Manjalar originates from Palani Hills, Tamil Nadu and runs towards east and joins the Vaigai River near Koottathu. There are nine anicuts and nine tanks in this sub-basin.

items.note: Sembanarkoil (formerly Semponnarkoil) is a panchayat town in Tharangambadi taluk in Mayiladuthurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is located in the historic Thanjavur area on the banks of the river Kaveri.

Veerateswarar Temple (also called Dakshapureeswarat temple) is a Hindu temple located at Keelaparasalur (formerly known as Thirupariyalur) in the Sembanarkoil block of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirupparialur.

Keezhaiyur is a revenue village in the Karaikal taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated at a distance of about 6 kilometres south-east of Karaikal town and 2 kilometres east of Tirumalarajanpattinam commune.

Natrunaiyappar Temple(நற்றுணையப்பர் ஆலயம்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the village of Ponsei or Thirunanipalli (Chola Nadu - South of Kaveri), Mayiladuthurai district, East-Central Tamil Nadu, South India. It's one of the holy place "Tevaram has been sung on the primary god of the Shiva (Paadal Petra sthalam)".

Ponsei Thirunanipalli is one of the villages of Kidarankondan panchayat. It is located in Mayiladuthurai district and state of Tamil Nadu, under Poompuhar Assembly Constituency and Mayiladuthurai parliamentary Constituency.
Akkur Thanthondreeswarar Temple(ஆக்கூர் தான்தோன்றீசுவரர் கோயில் ]) is a Hindu temple located at Akkur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.
Akkur is a small town in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from Mayiladuthurai town. Akkur is located 260 km from the state capital, Chennai.
Manjalar originates from Palani Hills, Tamil Nadu and runs towards east and joins the Vaigai River near Koottathu. There are nine anicuts and nine tanks in this sub-basin.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (119 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (120 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Semponarkoil Swarnapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sembanarkoil, Veerateeswarar Temple, Thirupariyalur, Keezhaiyur, Ponsei Natrunaiyappar Temple, Ponsei-Kidarankondan.
